channel.title: MySQL database on Susan Chen
channel.description: Recent content in MySQL database on Susan Chen

item.title: Project 5 : Airline Reservation Flask Web App
item.description: This project consisted of building a flask web app for an airline reservation system. The app is able to handle different signup and login for customers, booking agents, and airline staffs. The app also has different use cases for these three users. Customer Use Cases signup/login search for flights using the airport code and city name purchase flights view personal spending view past and upcoming flights Booking Agent Use Cases signup/login search for flights purchase flights for a customer view their commission for a specific range of time view their top customers by commission earned and tickets sold Airline Staff Use Cases signup/login searh for & view past and upcoming flights for their airline view top customers and agents view distribution of sales (direct vs indirect) add new planes, airports, & flights update flight status view top destintations Anonymous User Use Cases search for flights Project Details:
